summary: The session focused on popular activities and equipment rental options for water sports in Bali, including surfing, paddleboarding, snorkeling, and parasailing. The user expressed interest in trying parasailing and extreme water sports, receiving recommendations for various operators and activities available in Bali.
facts: Bali is known for its great surf breaks, attracting surfers from all over the world. The user is interested in trying parasailing while in Bali. Bali Jetpacks and Water Sports, located in Tanjung Benoa, offers parasailing along with other water sports. Nusa Dua Water Sports provides parasailing with views of the Indian Ocean. Bali Jet Set Dive and Marine Sports in Sanur offers parasailing experiences that include a shuttle boat to reef waters. The user is also interested in extreme water sports available in Bali. White water rafting is available on the Ayung, Telaga Waja, and Melangit rivers in Bali. Flyboarding is offered by Bali Jetpacks and Water Sports, Air Bali Parasailing, and Bali Wake Park. Waterfall canyoning tours are provided by Bali Sobek and Adventure & Spirit. Scuba diving with manta rays is a thrilling activity available at Nusa Penida Island from June to September.
